title: bromus squarrosus var. contortus
intro: Bromus squarrosus var. contortus, also known as twisted meadow brome or twisted brown-top brome, is a subspecies of the bromegrass plant, native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bromus squarrosus var. contortus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems.
